detectors.name: fixed_threshold
detectors.description: Static per-metric thresholds (CPU 80, Memory 90, Connections 500, Bandwidth 10240 KB/s) with 2-sample debounce.

detectors.name: plain_zscore
detectors.description: Rolling mean±stddev z-score (|z|≥3, window 100≈50min). Non-robust: long tails inflate stddev and mask real shifts.

detectors.name: ewma
detectors.description: Exponentially-weighted moving average with residual EWMA (α=0.1, k=3). Adapts to slow drift but chases sustained spikes.

detectors.name: mahalanobis
detectors.description: Multivariate robust composite: per-metric robust z gated at 3σ, L2-combined, fires when composite ≥ 4.2σ. Diagonal-covariance approximation.

detectors.name: robust_shift
detectors.description: Robust z-score (median/MAD) with baseline-shift and multi-gate policy on a 24h rolling window, scanned every 5 min. Production surrogate.
